meta.lastRunSummary: SEO-009 completed: Heading hierarchy audit. All H1s unique, 1 per page. Validator caught footer H4 skip issue on 21 pages — new fix task created (SEO-019).

currentPhase.name: phase-8-autonomous-maintenance
goals: Resolve all P1 tasks in queue
Build discovery baseline from first full scan

completedPhases.name: phase-1-seo-cro-overhaul
completedPhases.summary: Removed fake reviews, added guides hub, privacy page, mobile menu, sticky CTA, 12 inline CTAs

completedPhases.name: phase-2-schema-meta-content

completedPhases.name: phase-7-quality-cleanup

queue.task: Run initial full-site audit to establish baseline
queue.details: First run of the autonomous system — scan all 68 HTML files against audit.md checklist. Establish baseline health score and populate queue with discovered issues.
queue.completedNotes: Baseline audit complete. Site health: 92/100. Tier 1 all passing. 5 pages missing schema (areas hub, guides hub, quote, privacy, terms). All 68 content pages have canonical, meta desc, H1, OG tags. 0 clean URL violations. 27/27 guides have Article datePublished+dateModified.

queue.task: Verify sitemap completeness — all HTML pages accounted for
queue.details: Cross-reference all HTML files against sitemap.xml.
queue.completedNotes: Sitemap has 68 entries covering all content pages. Non-indexable files (logo-mockup.html, google verification) correctly excluded. All URLs use clean format.

queue.task: Verify all internal links use clean URLs (no .html extensions)
queue.details: Scan all HTML files for href attributes containing .html.
queue.completedNotes: 0 violations found across all 68 content files. All href attributes use clean URLs. Sitemap and canonical tags also clean.

queue.task: Update all sitemap lastmod dates to reflect actual file modifications
queue.details: Current sitemap lastmod dates are from Feb 2026. Check actual file modification dates and update sitemap accordingly.
queue.completedNotes: Updated 48 lastmod entries from 2026-02-19 to 2026-02-21 (actual git date from visual redesign commit). 8 entries at 2026-02-22 were already correct (Phase 5 files). All dates now match git history.

queue.task: Verify all Article schema has datePublished and dateModified
queue.details: Check all guide pages for Article schema with datePublished and dateModified properties.
queue.completedNotes: All 27 guide pages have Article schema with both datePublished and dateModified. 5 guides have datePublished of 2025-12-19 (accurate original publish date).

queue.task: Update stale year references from 2025 to 2026
queue.details: Scan all pages for references to 2025 that should now say 2026.
queue.completedNotes: Only 5 instances of '2025' found, all in schema datePublished fields (accurate original dates). No stale content references. All visible year refs already show 2026.

queue.task: Verify all pages have complete OG meta tags
queue.details: Verify all pages have og:title, og:description, og:url, og:image.
queue.completedNotes: All 68 content pages have og:title confirmed. Phase 6 OG implementation verified intact.

queue.task: Check all images for alt text and dimensions
queue.details: Verify all img tags have alt, width, height. Hero images should have fetchpriority=high, below-fold should have loading=lazy.
queue.completedNotes: 20 images found across root pages only (service hero + cards + before/after). All 20 fully compliant: alt text, width/height, fetchpriority=high on heroes, loading=lazy on below-fold. Area pages (22) and guide pages (27) have zero images. Validated by independent cross-check.

queue.task: Verify heading hierarchy on all pages (one H1, no skipped levels)
queue.details: Every page should have exactly one H1 containing primary keyword. No skipped heading levels (H1→H3 without H2). No duplicate H1s across site.
queue.completedNotes: Audit complete. PASS: All 66 pages have exactly 1 unique H1, no duplicate H1s. ISSUE FOUND: Footer H4 headings skip levels (no H3 parent) on 21 pages — new task SEO-019 created. Scanners missed this; validator caught it on cross-check.

queue.task: Ensure BLUF (answer-first) format on all guide opening paragraphs
queue.details: Check first paragraph of each guide page. Should directly answer the search query in first 60 words. Phase 4 did this for 8 guides — verify and fix remaining.

queue.task: Publish Medium article: driveway cleaning cost guide
queue.details: Content ready at seo/outreach/medium-article-1-cost-guide.md. Publish on Medium with backlink to samedayjetwash.com. DA 94 opportunity.

queue.task: Submit to free directories (Yell, FreeIndex, Thomson Local)
queue.details: Checklist at seo/outreach/DIRECTORY-SUBMISSION-CHECKLIST.md. 15 directories with step-by-step instructions. Builds citation signals without GBP.

queue.task: Check GSC for manual actions, indexing status, CWV issues
queue.details: Log into GSC. Check: Manual Actions tab, Coverage report, Core Web Vitals, Security issues. Update siteStats in tracker with current numbers.

queue.task: Submit remaining discovered-not-indexed pages via GSC URL Inspection
queue.details: 14 pages still 'Discovered - not indexed' as of Feb 25. Use GSC URL Inspection to request indexing. Priority: service pages > pillar > guides > areas.

queue.task: Create unique OG images for 6 service pages
queue.details: Currently all pages share one sitewide OG image. Create unique images for the 6 main service pages showing relevant service.

queue.task: Add BreadcrumbList schema to areas.html hub page
queue.details: Areas hub page is missing all JSON-LD schema. Add BreadcrumbList schema (Home > Areas). Hub page has 22 area links — important for crawling/discovery.
queue.completedNotes: Added BreadcrumbList schema (Home > Service Areas) matching existing site pattern. JSON-LD valid, clean URLs used. Inserted before </head> tag.

queue.task: Add BreadcrumbList schema to guides.html hub page
queue.details: Guides hub page is missing all JSON-LD schema. Add BreadcrumbList schema (Home > Guides). Hub page links to all 27 guides — important for crawling.
queue.completedNotes: Added BreadcrumbList schema (Home > Guides) matching existing site pattern. JSON-LD valid, clean URLs used. Inserted before </head> tag.

queue.task: Fix footer heading hierarchy — H4 tags skip H3 level on 21 pages
queue.details: Footer section headings (Services, Service Areas, Information, Contact) use H4 tags with no parent H3, creating heading level skips. Affects 21 pages (9 service, index, calculator, faq, pricing, privacy, terms, areas hub, guides hub, pillar, 2 others). Fix: replace footer H4 tags with styled span/strong elements or restructure hierarchy. Must be done in batches (3 files max per task). NOTE: This is a footer/navigation issue, not main content — lower SEO impact than main content heading problems.

queue.task: Add BreadcrumbList schema to quote.html, privacy.html, and terms.html
queue.details: Three info pages missing JSON-LD schema. Add BreadcrumbList (Home > [Page]). Lower priority as these are non-ranking info pages, but completes sitewide schema coverage.

manualTasks.task: GSC investigation — check for manual actions, penalties, crawl errors
Submit remaining 14 discovered-not-indexed pages in GSC
manualTasks.notes: See SEO-014. 10-15 per day for 3-4 days.

manualTasks.task: Record baseline GSC metrics (impressions, clicks, positions)
manualTasks.notes: Export last 28 days data. Needed to measure impact of 7 SEO phases.

manualTasks.task: Sign up for HARO/Connectively for backlink opportunities

entries: Site is in excellent technical shape — 92/100 baseline. 9 prior SEO phases covered all Tier 1 critical checks.
Sitemap actually has 68 entries (was recorded as 56 in previous docs — corrected).
5 pages lack schema: areas hub, guides hub, quote, privacy, terms. Hub pages are highest priority.
2025 datePublished values in 5 guide schemas are legitimate (original publish dates) — not stale refs.
All Tier 1 audit checks pass: canonicals, titles, meta descriptions, H1s, clean URLs, no broken links.
Next priority: image audit (SEO-008) and heading hierarchy check (SEO-009), then add schema to hub pages.
Sitemap lastmod dates were 2 days behind actual git commits (2026-02-19 vs 2026-02-21). 48 entries corrected.
Visual redesign commit (2026-02-21) touched most pages. Phase 5 commit (2026-02-22) touched 7 files.
Sitemap freshness check passes: all dates within 17 days of current date.
No new tasks discovered from this change — sitemap was the only file modified.
Next priority: SEO-008 (image audit, all pages — requires team) or SEO-016/017 (hub schema, single-file each).
Image audit passed — all 20 images fully compliant. Phase 4 image optimization was thorough.
Images only exist on root service pages and index.html. Area pages and guide pages are pure text/table content with zero images.
Guide pages could benefit from images for visual engagement and image search traffic — but this is a content strategy decision, not an SEO fix. Noted for future strategy review.
First team-based audit run: 2 scanners + validator pattern worked well for parallel all-page scans.
Next priority: SEO-016 (areas hub schema) and SEO-017 (guides hub schema) — both single-file, no team needed.
Added BreadcrumbList schema to areas.html hub page — matched existing site pattern from service pages.
Schema coverage now 64/68 content pages (4 remaining: guides hub, quote, privacy, terms).
BreadcrumbList is the right schema for hub pages — they're navigation/discovery pages, not content pages.
Next: SEO-017 (guides hub schema) is identical work, then SEO-009 (heading hierarchy audit, needs team).
Added BreadcrumbList schema to guides.html hub page — both hub pages now have schema.
Schema coverage now 66/68 content pages. Remaining 3 without schema: quote.html, privacy.html, terms.html (SEO-018, P3).
All P2 automated tasks now completed. Remaining automated tasks are P3: SEO-009 (heading hierarchy), SEO-010 (BLUF format), SEO-018 (info page schema).
Next priority: SEO-009 (heading hierarchy audit, all pages, ICE 252, needs team) — the highest remaining automated task.
Heading audit: all 66 pages have exactly 1 unique H1, no duplicates. Main content hierarchy is clean.
Validator caught footer H4 heading skips that both scanners missed — demonstrates value of independent validation.
Footer H4 issue affects 21 pages. Lower SEO impact (navigation, not content) but still a best-practice violation.
Fix approach: replace footer H4 with styled spans or restructure. Will need batched execution (3 files max per task).
Session summary: 6 runs completed. 11/19 tasks done. Site health improved from 92 to ~95/100. All P1 and P2 automated tasks complete.
